title: DNC 2024 roll call vote: What to know about the process

title: Rick Scott, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell win, set up Senate showdown
shortDescription: Republican Sen. Rick Scott will face Democratic former Rep. Debbie Mucarsel-Powell after each won their primary Tuesday.

title: Donald Trump's press secretary backs Kamala Harris

title: Wyoming voters talk changing state, frustration with government
